briefdescription.para: This function will initialize the PLMI module.

parameterdescription.para: - Function pointer to address range validation handler that validates if a given address range is accessible by the specified subsystem.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the Runtime Configuration Area with default values.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

inbodydescription.para: Set the default PLM Run time configuration values

briefdescription.para: This function calls all the PS LPD init functions of all the different modules.

detaileddescription.para: As a part of init functions, modules can register the command handlers, interrupt handlers with the interface layer.

inbodydescription.para: Enable Slave Error for PSM Global

briefdescription.para: This function resets LpdInitialized variable to 0.
This function sets LpdInitialized variable with given flag.

parameterdescription.para: to set the UART or LPD WDT initialization state.

briefdescription.para: This function clears LpdInitialized variable with given flag.

parameterdescription.para: to unset the UART or LPD WDT initialization state.

briefdescription.para: This function sets XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR with PlmKatStatus.

parameterdescription.para: contains the KAT status updated by PLM

briefdescription.para: This function is called to get KAT status.
This function sets XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR with PlmKatMask.

parameterdescription.para: contains the kat mask that needs to be set

briefdescription.para: This function clears XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR with PlmKatMask.

parameterdescription.para: contains the kat mask that needs to be cleared

briefdescription.para: This function will return the crypto kat enable status from efuse cache.

simplesect.para: TRUE If crypto kat bit is set FALSE If crypto kat bit is not set

briefdescription.para: This file contains the PLMI module register functions.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.00 kc 02/07/2019 Initial release 1.01 ma 08/01/2019 Added LPD init code 1.02 kc 02/19/2020 Moved code to support PLM banner from PLM app bsv 04/04/2020 Code clean up 1.03 bsv 07/07/2020 Made functions used in single translation unit as static kc 07/28/2020 Moved LpdInitialized from xplmi_debug.c to xplmi.c bm 09/08/2020 Added RunTime Configuration Init API to XPlmi_Init bm 10/14/2020 Code clean up td 10/19/2020 MISRA C Fixes 1.04 bm 10/28/2020 Added ROM Version Print har 03/17/2021 Added code for run time initialization of Secure State registers ma 03/24/2021 Print early logs bm 03/24/2021 Added RTCA initialization for Error Status registers har 03/31/2021 Added RTCA initialization for PDI ID bsv 04/16/2021 Add provision to store Subsystem Id in XilPlmi bm 05/05/2021 Added USR_ACCESS support for PLD0 image ma 05/21/2021 Copy secure boot state from PMC GLOBAL GEN STORAGE2 register to RTCA Secure State offset 1.05 td 07/08/2021 Fix doxygen warnings bsv 07/18/2021 Print PLM banner at the beginning of PLM execution bsv 07/24/2021 Clear RTC area at the beginning of PLM bsv 08/02/2021 Code clean up to reduce elf size rb 07/29/2021 Update reset reason during Init ma 08/23/2021 Do not clear Debug Log RTCA memory ma 09/13/2021 Set PLM prints log level during RTCA init tnt 11/11/2021 Add RTCA initialization for MIO Flush routine tnt 12/17/2021 Add RTCA initialization for PL_POR HDIO WA 1.06 bm 07/06/2022 Refactor versal and versal_net code kpt 07/19/2022 Added APIs to update or get KAT status from RTC area bm 07/22/2022 Update EAM logic for In-Place PLM Update 1.07 ng 11/11/2022 Updated doxygen comments kpt 01/04/2023 Added XPlmi_SetFipsKatMask command bm 01/14/2023 Remove bypassing of PLM Set Alive during boot bm 03/11/2023 Added status check for XPlmi_PreInit 1.08 sk 07/18/2023 Warn out for uart init fail sk 07/26/2023 Added redundant check for XPlmi_IsPlmUpdateDone dd 09/12/2023 MISRA-C violation Rule 10.3 fixed 1.09 ma 10/10/2023 Enable Slave Error for PSM_GLOBAL ng 01/28/2024 optimized u8 variables sk 02/18/2024 Added DDRMC Calib Check Status RTCA Register Init ng 03/20/2024 Added print to UART on log buffer full after LPD init 1.10 sk 06/05/2024 Added code to populate PLM version in RTCA Reg mss 06/13/2024 Added timestamp banner conditionally bm 07/15/2024 Fixed timestamp print in banner 1.11 sk 02/20/2025 Added EAM error config in LPDSLCR for Versal 2VE and 2VM Devices pre 08/21/2025 Added TPM initialization after LPD initialization pre 09/08/2025 Added logic to avoid flooding of log buffer with repeated error messages pre 03/16/2026 Added client support for TPM module
